reviews.title: Ear bud problem

reviews.title: You need to remove these every time you place earbuds in case
reviews.text: Be prepared to put these on and take them off every time you need to use your earbuds.  It take s a minute to get them on and align up all the cutouts with the holes in the earbuds.  It became a bit time intensive.

reviews.title: These Are Great With Only One Exception...
reviews.text: ...they fall off after two or three nights.  But I use my earbuds in bed so your mileage will vary.  However I am purchasing my second packet and one packet for the AirPods for a buddy so they are worth the price.  However I'm going to use less than a drop of Elmer's Glue on each of my earbuds so they will stay on long.  Obviously the designers did not consider anyone was stupid enough to sleep in the earbuds but yes, I am that stupid.  ;-)

reviews.title: Uncomfortable
reviews.text: Got these for testing. They did break after a couple of years of use. They are also very uncomfortable. The headband is not a great design. However they do what they are intended to do.

reviews.title: Work well for online meetings
reviews.text: My school district is purchasing a set of 50 for my yearbook classroom where my science students spend a fair amount of time.  This one was purchased to try out at home.  Sound quality is good and mic quality isn't bad, either.  After wearing them for an hour, my ears really need a break, though - but I have a pretty big head; these should be more comfortable for my middle schoolers.  I wish they came with a blue accent as an option, though.  The ones at school will have the green accents.

reviews.title: Look at the shape of the earphones

reviews.title: Gets the job done!
reviews.text: Decent headphone/Mic combo. Not the best (no volume control), but it's great for the price! I use it for my podcast and for gaming/twitch streaming, and it works out fine!

title: [2 Pack] Airtag Keychain for Apple Air Tag Holder IPX8 Waterproof 360 Full Body Shockproof Protective Cover Case Scratch Resistant for Pets, Dog, Keys, Cat, Luggage-Black
features: 【Compatibility】Exclusively designed airtag holder for newly released Apple Airtag 2021 (Note: Airtag is not included).

【IPX8 Water Tolerance】This airtag keychain holder takes advantage of IPX8 waterproof: no water leakage or penetration or damage even 6m(20ft) deep underwater. It becomes durable to sweat, rain, wash, and daily laundry, making it washable when it is stained with dust or dirt.

【Shockproof & Full-body Protection】Made from the hybrid material of PC and TPU, makes your Airtag invulnerable. Equip this as armor to the air tag keychain to prevent scratches, drops, shocks, and damage from every corner.

【Portable & Stylish Looking】This airtag case, simple but protective, adds more eye-catching help you find your belongings, like bags, luggage, and keys. Easy to install and dispart. You can attach it to whatever belongings you like.

【One-step Installation& Use Occasion】Four steps is quite enough to cover your Airtag with such an extraordinary case.Attachable to car key, backpack, schoolbag, dog leash, and other belongings you want to track. Easily attach your airtag to the things you want to keep track of.

reviews.title: Pros and Cons
reviews.text: Pros:  I really like these holders.  I would give it a 5 star if they were all alike.  two are as demoed in the video and two are totally different.  Cons:  The two white/clear holders are totally different from the blamk and pink.  The clear back just snaps on, and does not completely close and lock with the circle ring.  If it snaps apart, you could loose the airtag!!!  I decided to keep them because I do like the pink and black.  I put the other two in my car in case it was stolen.  The other two I can put on my key ring.  Very nice holder, just wish all four were like the pink and black.  It does NOT show this in the demo video.

reviews.title: There is absolutely no bass, highs screeching high and nothing inbetween
reviews.text: These do not fit well and hard to keep in ear. My much cheaper earphones sound much better and much more bass. The treble is very high frequency but that is all you hear with this. Buy name brand and they would have more honest advertisement and better quality. I didn't expect to good bass for in ear earphones but this has non whatsoever and the high frequency could ruin your hearing. Maybe after few hundred hours it will sound better so will let you know. In the mean time pay a little more but get name brand.

reviews.title: Great sound, but a little bulky for an IEM
reviews.text: There are 6 drivers in here-1 DD and 5 BA, but the housings are pretty big. Definitely deep and will probably stick out of your ears, but sound great (with upgraded cable). For what you are paying, these IEMs are a steal. Sound fantastic. Find the the tips that work for you and upgrade the cable (I bought the 2.5 and 3.5 compatible cables from KBEAR and they are fantastic) and you will get as good of a sound as you will find from your source. Add a quality source (I use a Radsone EarStudio) and enjoy high quality sound on a budget.

title: SIMOLIO Wireless Headphones for TV Watching with Transmitter/Charging Dock 2 in 1, 2.4G Wireless Earbuds for TV Listening, Dialog Mode & Boosted Vol & Spare Battery for Seniors, by-Pass, 100ft Range
features: WIRELESS EARPHONES FOR TV FOR HARD OF HEARING W/ TV AUDIO LISTENING ASSISTANCE - Voice clarity and noise reduction tech reduces distracting background noises and makes you hear each word spoken on your favorite show with full intelligibility. Automatic signal control tech stabilizes sudden increases in TV volume to prevent damage to your hearing. Supports optical, RCA and 3.5 mm audio outputs on most TVs. Not recommended for pacemaker carriers.

ADVANCED 2.4GHZ AUTO FHSS TECH, NO PAIRING OR DELAY, 100FT LONG TRANSMISSION - Operating on the 2.4GHz radio frequency, this tv wireless earphone has superior sound reproduction and a powerful signal that can pass through ceilings or walls. No pairing required, no lip-sync delay, no need to be facing a certain angle or position, and no interference when someone passes by.

PROFESSIONAL WIRELESS TV HEADPHONE, CUSTOMIZE THE TV SOUND TO BEST FIT YOU - people with different sound frequency sensitivities can select TONE (treble/normal/bass) to find the best parameters and hear the target source clearly. The BALANCE control is specifically designed for people with different hearing levels in the left and right ears. You can select STEREO on the transmitter to enjoy Hi-fi music or MONO to enjoy clearer TV conversations.

UNIQUE 3 IN 1 DESIGN TV HEADPHONES FOR FULL CONVENIENCE, ERGONOMIC NECKBAND & SOFT EARBUDS & SPARE BATTERY FOR LASTING TV ENJOYMENT - Transmitter, charging base and headset stand 3-in-1 design for your full convenience. The built-in rechargeable and replaceable Li-battery supports 7 hours playtime. A spare battery is always in the base charged & ready for lasting TV enjoyment. The ergonomic neckband design and ultra-soft ear tips bring you an easy and comfortable TV viewing experience.

WIRELESS EARBUDS FOR TV WITH INNOVATIVE “BY-PASS” FEATURE SUPPORTS SIMULTANEOUS AUDIO TRANSMISSION TO WIRELESS HEADPHONE AND WIRED TV SOUBNDBAR - If you only have one TV audio output and it is currently occupied by your soundbar or AV receiver, the by-pass feature can help you, and it’s the best solution for families watching TV together.

reviews.title: Amazing ear pad replacements for the Logitech G35 headset!
reviews.text:
- Makes my G35 headset look better than when I bought it new thanks to the red accent markings!
- The installation tool was extremely helpful, and thanks for including it.
- Just a bit of warning for others the kit that includes the head pad isn’t mean for the Logitech G35 headset, because it is a different size and it doesn’t have Velcro underneath the head pad. I just ordered the ear pads only, and ended up using the spare two fake leather head pads that came with my G35 headset.
- Other thoughts: Not sure what some people are complaining about, but my ear pads are comfortable and fit my headset well. I’m just going to assume some peoples ears are extremely sensitive than others to certain fabrics. I like the cloth mesh pads compared to the original leather pads for two reasons. The cloth won’t crack or peel off like the leather pads, and the cloth pads are more breathable for the ears (ears won’t get hot or humid).

reviews.title: They are comfortable, which is the main thing
reviews.text: I bought these for my G930 since the outside was flaking off of mine a lot. I have been using these for almost 5 months and I have had no issues out of them. They are comfortable, which is the main thing. And since it isn't the fake leather of the original, I dont have a problem with it causing my ears to sweat or stick to it. Installing them were simple as well.

reviews.title: Barely noticeable difference between these pads and the official Logitech pads
reviews.text: The only difference in these pads is that the mesh is slightly rougher than that of the ear pads that come with the Logitech G430 headphones. Otherwise, there is no noticeable difference.

reviews.title: great replacement for my G930
reviews.text: I bought these blue mesh ear pads to replace my original fake leather pads on my Logitech G930 headphones. These went on super easily, took no effort, and are a perfect fit. They also come with a little tool to help slide the pads on but i didn't even need it. I also like the mesh pads because my ears stay a bit cooler than on the original leather-ish ones. These are a great value for the price, and I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.title: Good but scratchy.
reviews.text: They fit perfectly on my Logitech g35s but they are very scratchy.

title: Impeto RCA to 3.5mm Cable 10ft/3m, 6N OCC Aux to RCA Headphone Male to Male Jack Adapter Cotton Braided 1/8 to RCA Audio Y Cord Subwoofer Cable
features: 6N OCC Coaxial RCA Cables: Designed with high-purity (99%) 6N OCC Single Crystal Copper and Double-layer shielding, IMP-2203 coaxial RCA cables can seamlessly transfer high-quality audio signals, which brings you naturally clear and stereo sound. 24K gold-plated connector and solid reinforced copper shell ensure superior durability under heavy usage and multiple plugging and unplugging.

Premium Materials for Subwoofer Cable: The IMP-2203 RCA cables are made of classic cotton net braided, which is effective to avoid signal interference and puts through an 15000+ ultra-durable bend test to achieve a longer lifespan. Combined Wear-resistant and stylish.

High Quality Aux Cord: With the 75 ohm constant impedance, this aux cable arrives the standard of high-quality signal transmission in the digital era. Listening to nature, it feels like being on the spot to enjoy excellent details tuning and clear expression of musicians' emotional performance.

Wide Compatibility 3.5mm RCA Cables: IMP-2203 3.5mm to 2-Male RCA Audio Cord is compatible with iPhone, iPod, iPad, MP3, CD players, laptops, tablets and any other digital device with a 3.5mm audio jack, and also home audio systems, like amplifier or receiver with RCA jacks.

About Impeto: Back in 1986, Impeto was born in Italy. We are always striving to reach the next level and critical for every single details.Impeto offering a broad range of time-tested high-end audio and video cable connectors accessories direct to the retail. We have a comprehensive factory management system and production flow in China. Dark Samurai Series IMP-2203 10ft is made in Chinese factory.

reviews.title: Cheap Buys Cheap
reviews.text: Not sure what I expected for so little, so shame on me. I'll tell you these made my 9-year-old's ears hurt. I'm not sure how they could cancel any noise, as there is no buffer. I tried the ones she put on and they are very uncomfortable. Returning.

reviews.title: Great product and great price.
reviews.text: We bought a pack of these for my son because he goes through headphones crazy fast; since we bought these, he's still on the first pair. We will be buying more in the future if we have to.

reviews.title: They are priced low enough that a defective or marginal one doesn't sour the price.

reviews.title: For the cost… I am super happy with them.
reviews.text: I’m giving these earbuds five stars because they exceed my expectations when they only cost seventy cents each. I find it hard to complain about these, especially considering the cost. The sound is quite adequate for such earbuds. I use these in a classroom setting for kids who either cannot afford earbuds or forget there is at home. They are individually packaged. Nice assortment of colors. Though they are being sold by a US company, I do not show where they are made. I can only assume they are made in China.

reviews.title: Great Sound Just Wish they had a Microphone
reviews.text: Fun colors and love this type of ear plug over the cone shaped style. Listening to music on my phone sounds great  but I wish they had a microphone so I could easily answer calls. Now I have to unplug the earphones when the phone starts to ring and then re-plug after I'm done on the call. I guess they are really designed for use on exclusive music players. The listing is confusing because it says "Bluetooth" which they don't have, but the wire is about 4ft. long so your music unit can easily be kept anywhere convenient. No volume control either so that has to be handled on your phone/music player.

reviews.title: Just What I Wanted
reviews.text: I wanted to replace my old clunker of a boom box.  I needed a small CD player with_ a speaker so I wouldn't have to wear ear buds.  That's what I found here. At first, I wondered about the sound, but considering how small it is, the sound is fine.  I'm glad to have easier access to my CD collection.

reviews.title: Great Bluetooth CD player
reviews.text:
I have a few CDs that I have kept despite mostly using streaming services. Music not available online. This device allows me to hear them again.
Connected very easy to my Bluetooth tailgate speaker.

Don't plan on using the built in speaker as I have several better speakers that I can connect to with cable or Bluetooth.

reviews.title: Sound Quality not the best on its own speakers
reviews.text:
I found using the Aux cable along with my Bluetooth headphones the sound quality is much better.
The headphones that came with unit wasn't that good.

reviews.title: Very Good Portable CD Player With Plenty of Options
reviews.text:
With the onset of Pandora, satellite radio and many other such options, I found I wasn’t playing my CDs anymore. In fact, I couldn’t find my CD player! And the high-end system in my truck doesn’t even have a CD option. So when I saw this I figured I give it a try. I like that it’s portable and plays without skipping even when bumped, running with it, or the dog knocking it off of the table. It can be used with my several different sets of earphones. It also plugs into my truck stereo without a problem.

I also wanted it to play through its own speaker while in my crafts room. This is where the 5th star gets removed. When turning it up nearly all the way the speaker starts to buzz on certain notes. It isn’t loud at all on its own either so using it without auxiliary speakers is not good if more than about 8 feet from it. However, I am playing my CDs which I have not heard in years, and that makes me very happy.

reviews.title: Fun and good
reviews.text:
My 13 yo son is on the vintage wave, so he has been using this and the cassette one. He is happy!
Very portable, small size.
The sound is ok.
Has been using it non stop and still working good.
Would be a fun gift for someone who likes old school (on a fun way, not like a collector)
We like it.

reviews.title: Great for outside work

Was wearing these when taking down Christmas decorations and listening to an audio book.

My neighbor thought it was ignoring him but I just didn’t hear him - these have good noise cancellation. Sound quality was great too.

reviews.title: Solid Value
reviews.text: Regular ear buds don't fit in my ears so I need the "wings." I am very happy with how they perform but they are not as "full range" as more expensive brands.

reviews.title: Good customer service
reviews.text: I had some issues with my first set and the customer service was awesome. I appreciate a company that will backup their products.

reviews.title: Love these
reviews.text: These are comfortable and easy to use. Good sound as well.

reviews.title: Good sound quality
reviews.text:
These are good quality but my left ear is uncomfortable. My ear must be a different shape. I was hoping the battery life would be better, but its ok. I use it to listen to books while i work. Take calls when needed.
Most bluetooth headsets have a delay or echo. These do not. It makes phone calls very clear.
These are the best sound quality of all but my Dewalt headsets.
The battery lasts about 5 to 6 hours with my streaming usage. Probably last much longer with just calls.
My left ear hurts after a couple hours, but ny right ear is fine for all day.
They charge quickly about an hour maybe a little more.
DON'T MISPLACE THE CHARGING CASE they will become worthless. They can't be charged without it.
And it seems if they power off by themselves they have to be reset in the case.
All that being said i probably would buy them again.
